no song today sorry I didnt know what to put in. Didnt really had the motovation to search for one tbh 🥲

SO HAVE YOU MISSED ME?? So yeah I have been gone for almost this whole year lol but I can say Im recovering good. I of course have to go to some check ups every now and then but everything looks good. Im 19 now :D Too crazy for me like help.

BUT I cant exactly tell you if Im REALLY back. I just dont know if I want to continue doing bots FREQUENTLY. I just want to spent more time with friends and with my family. And Im sorry for not updating frequently especially to my friends here. I really havent been active and Im sorry for not texting...

Im not quitting janitor entirely. What Im saying is, I will post a bot once in a while but definitly not as frequently as I used to before I was ill. I hope you can understand that. Thank you again for everyones support, it still means a lot to me and Im sorry I havent showed it to you.. thank you. AND for the 100 followers which was kind of surprising to me 😭 but no seriously thank you all

And then again

Have fun chatting🎀
